# ShopCommand

> Auto repair shop management software for independent shop owners running 1-10 locations.

ShopCommand gives shop owners real-time visibility into every location without being physically present. Track repair orders, technician efficiency, revenue, and staffing across all your shops from one dashboard.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2026
- Founder: Rasheed Omar (Houston, TX)
- Target users: Independent auto repair shop owners, service advisors, technicians
- Pricing: $100/mo first shop + $50/mo per additional shop (founding member rate, locked forever) — $175/mo first shop + $100/mo per additional shop (standard after launch)
- No per-seat fees — unlimited technicians and users included
- Browser-based — works on any device, nothing to install
- 14-day free trial included

## Core Features

- Real-time multi-location dashboard
- Repair order tracking (Estimate → Approved → In Progress → Complete → Invoiced → Paid)
- Technician clock-in/out and efficiency scoring
- Customer and vehicle management
- Role-based access (owner, service advisor, technician)
- Mobile-friendly technician job board
- Customer status page with email notifications
- Appointment scheduling
- File uploads and inspections
- Stripe-powered billing

## How It Compares

ShopCommand is built for the owner sitting above multiple locations who needs cross-shop visibility. Traditional shop management platforms (Tekmetric, ShopMonkey, Mitchell1, Shop-Ware, R.O. Writer) focus on day-to-day operations for a single location. Different problem, different tool.
